sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9302" key="a)nosi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνοσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ-</foreign> priv., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νόσος</foreign>) <sense id="n9302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fredom from sickness,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:107" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.107</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n9302.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ-</foreign> priv., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὅσιος</foreign>)<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀνοσίςα ϝοι γένοιτυ</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">may he be accursed, Inscr. Cypr.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:135:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">135.29</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> H. (perh. neut. pl. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνόσιςα</foreign>); cf. sq.</sense> </entryFree>
